LightningComponentBundle.description: Advanced Zodiac Analyzer - A comprehensive Lightning Web Component that provides detailed cosmic analysis including Western zodiac signs, Chinese zodiac, numerology, compatibility insights, career suggestions, and famous personalities. Features name and date of birth input with extensive personality traits and cosmic guidance.

property.name: name
property.label: Full Name
property.description: Enter the person's full name for numerology calculation

property.name: dateOfBirth
property.label: Date of Birth
property.description: Enter date of birth in YYYY-MM-DD format
